title: Breakwave Dry Bulk Shipping Report 6.11.2024
summary:
Main
in Weekly Shipbuilding Reports 11/06/2024
Steady as it goes while curve inverses and sentiment moderates - The past few weeks have been uncharacteristically calm for the otherwise volatile dry bulk market. Source: Breakwave Advisors

Linked asset: 2024-06-11_BreakwaveDryJune112024Report.pdf
Source asset: reports/hellenic/shipbuilding/pdfs/2024-06-11_BreakwaveDryJune112024Report.pdf

[Page 1]
BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
June 11, 2024
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 2,021 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 1,883 Short-term Indicators:
↓ 30D: -10.2% ↓ 30D: -11.6% Momentum: Neutral
↑ YTD: 34.8% ↓ YTD: -10.1% Sentiment: Neutral
↑ YOY: 43.8% ↑ YOY: 78.5% Fundamentals: Negative
Bi-Weekly Report
• Steady as it goes while curve inverses and sentiment moderates - The past few weeks have been uncharacteristically
calm for the otherwise volatile dry bulk market. Although spot Capesize rates have been ticking higher, such a strength
has not been jumpy as it usually is, at a time when futures were already pricing some improvement going to the
month of June.
